summary: Frontend testing attempted but site appears stuck on loading screen. Code review shows all requested changes have been implemented correctly in the codebase.

ui_bugs.issue: Website appears stuck on loading screen - only shows loading spinner

integration_issues.issue: Frontend may not be connecting to backend API properly or has JavaScript runtime errors

passed_tests: Backend API health check returns status 200
Code review confirms all requested changes implemented
Marquee text updated in translation files
Footer and hero links point to oeh.jku.at/wirtschaft

action_item_for_main_agent.critical_issue: Frontend website is stuck on loading screen and not rendering content properly. This prevents proper UI testing of the implemented features.
investigation_needed: Check frontend console errors in browser developer tools
Verify all API endpoints are accessible from frontend
Check for JavaScript runtime errors or missing dependencies
Ensure frontend build completed successfully without critical errors
action_item_for_main_agent.code_verification: All requested changes appear correctly implemented in code but cannot be visually verified due to loading issue
